title: Restore the SORT view as a default on ITEM
excerpt: Previously (before 1/8/24) EVERY board had the ability to sort alphabetically by ITEM NAME (the first column). That has now gone away and you have to add “Item name” sort as an alternative View. This was a terrible disse…

posts.author: Sierra (Sierra Orr)
posts.cookedHtml: Previously (before 1/8/24) EVERY board had the ability to sort alphabetically by ITEM NAME (the first column). That has now gone away and you have to add “Item name” sort as an alternative View. This was a terrible disservice. Please restore the ability to sort by item name for all boards as the default in the Main Table

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Sierra,

Sorry to hear of your frustration! I wanted to let you know that we currently have known bug specific to being unable to sort the item/subitem columns. Our team is working hard to release a fix as soon as possible. As soon as we receive an update, I will let you know

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Sierra,

I wanted to let you know that this has now been resolved! Can you let us know if you’re able to sort that item name now? Thanks

posts.author: Sierra (Sierra Orr)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes! It is working now. Thank you.
